picks.title: Palo Alto Earth Day Festival
picks.why: Annual Earth Day festival with sustainability workshops and local environmental organizations—celebrate spring while learning real impact.

picks.title: Viva CalleSJ Activity Hub
picks.why: Viva CalleSJ closes East Side streets to cars for walking, biking, and community—rare chance to reclaim public space.

picks.title: STEM Zone: Where Silicon Valley Sparks Innovation and Fun
picks.why: Free STEM event featuring American astronaut Sirisha Bandla speaking—once-a-year opportunity for kids and adults to meet space explorer.
